---
id: add-stream
title: "AddASRStream"
description: "Add the specified stream to the ASR task. Only effective when the RecognitionRange parameter is set to 1."
api: 
info_path: extended_services/cloud-realtime-asr/en/server/api-reference/open-api-desc
date: "2026-06-02"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>AddASRStream</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


Add the specified stream to the ASR task. Only effective when the RecognitionRange parameter is set to 1.
## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> API prototype parameter\n>\n> https://cloud-realtime-asr-api.zegotech.cn?Action=AddASRStream\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["AddASRStream"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Application ID, assigned by ZEGOCLOUD. Get it from the [ZEGOCLOUD Admin Console](https://console.zegocloud.com/).","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. 16-bit hexadecimal random string (hex encoding of 8 bytes of random number). For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Current Unix timestamp, in seconds. For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>, maximum allowed deviation of 10 minutes.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Signature version number.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Signature, used to verify the legitimacy of the request. Please refer to [Signature Mechanism](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism) to generate.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"TaskId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of the task.","example":"1920370518175780864"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>StreamInfo</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>The stream to be recognized.</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"StreamId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Stream ID to be recognized."}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>ASR</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>ASR parameters</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Vendor"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`Tencent`, `AliyunParaformer`, `AliyunGummy`, `Microsoft`]"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"ASR vendor. Refer to [Configure ASR](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr) parameter description. If you need Alibaba, Microsoft recognition vendors, please contact ZEGOCLOUD business support to enable.","enum":["Tencent","AliyunParaformer","AliyunGummy","Microsoft"],"default":"Tencent","example":"Tencent"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Params"} required={false} schemaName={"object"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"object","description":"Vendor parameters. For specific usage, refer to the Params parameter description in [Configure ASR](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr).","example":{"engine_model_type":"16k_zh","hotword_list":"zego|10"}}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"VADSilenceSegmentation"} required={false} schemaName={"number"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** `>= 200` and `<= 2000`"} schema={{"type":"number","description":"Used to set how many milliseconds after the user stops speaking, two sentences will no longer be considered as one.\nUnit is ms, range [200, 2000], default is 500.\nFor detailed explanation, refer to [Configure ASR - Speech Segmentation Control](/cloud-realtime-asr/configuring-asr#speech-segmentation-control).\n","minimum":200,"maximum":2000,"default":500,"example":500}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"HotWord"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","deprecated":true,"description":"This parameter is deprecated. Please set it through Params vendor parameters."}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"EnableTranslation"} required={false} schemaName={"boolean"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether to enable translation."}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>Translation</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>Translation LLM configuration item</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Vendor"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`DoubaoSeedTranslation`, `QwenMT`]"} schema={{"type":"string","description":"LLM vendor to call.","enum":["DoubaoSeedTranslation","QwenMT"],"example":"DoubaoSeedTranslation"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"SourceLanguage"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Source language","example":"zh"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"TargetLanguage"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Target language","example":"en"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={true} className={"schemaItem"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"}><summary style={{}}><span className={"openapi-schema__container"}><strong className={"openapi-schema__property"}>LLM</strong><span className={"openapi-schema__name"}> object</span><span className={"openapi-schema__divider"}></span><span className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</span></span></summary><div className={"schema-description-container"}><div className={"schema-description"}>LLM parameters for translation.</div><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Url"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"LLM interface address to call. Different for different Vendors:\n- When Vendor is DoubaoSeedTranslation: https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/responses\n- When Vendor is QwenMT: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions\n","example":"https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/responses"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"ApiKey"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"The parameter used for authentication by the LLM service provider.","example":""}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Model"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"The LLM model name to call, required. Different vendors support different models.","example":"doubao-seed-translation-250915"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Params"} required={false} schemaName={"object"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"object","description":"LLM or application platform request parameters, optional.<br>\n- For OpenAI protocol, you can configure parameters such as max_tokens, temperature, stream, etc.<br>\n- For other application platforms, you can fill in the parameters supported by the platform.","example":{}}}></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem></div></details></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Sequence"} required={false} schemaName={"int64"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Request sequence number, used to guarantee the ordering of add and delete operations on the same stream. The backend only processes the request with the latest Sequence. If not set, requests are processed in the order received by the backend.\n> 📌 **Important**\n> The Sequence values for AddASRStream and DeleteASRStream must be sequential. For example:\n> 1. AddASRStream(Sequence:1)\n> 2. DeleteASRStream(Sequence:2)\n> 3. AddASRStream(Sequence:3)\n> 4. DeleteASRStream(Sequence:4)\n> 5. ...\n"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>
<div><div><ApiTabs label={undefined} id={undefined}><TabItem label={"200"} value={"200"}><div>Add stream success</div><div><MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime"} schemaType={"response"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json"}><SchemaTabs className={"openapi-tabs__schema"}><TabItem label={"Schema"} value={"Schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details response"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-response"}><strong>Schema</strong></summary><ul className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"Return code. 0 indicates success; other values indicate failure. For details, refer to [Return Codes](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/return-codes).","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request result description.","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request ID.","example":"6710396424239903698"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example"} value={"Example"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
